title: MT❯3 Voted Canadian Lawyer Readers’ Choice Favourite in Litigation Support and e-Discovery Consultants
content:
## MT❯3 Voted Canadian Lawyer Readers’ Choice Favourite in Litigation Support and e-Discovery Consultants
For the fifth year in a row, MT❯3 has received the Canadian Lawyer Readers’ Choice Award for Litigation Support and e-Discovery Consultants.
As AI and machine learning continue to change the nature of legal work, the team at MT❯3 are showing clients and the legal industry how the technology can be successfully adopted and deployed, meeting and resolving some of the most rigorous and complex data management and e-discovery challenges in litigation.
MT❯3’s lawyers, technical analysts, and project managers provide comprehensive, tailored solutions in digital information management and e-Discovery, due diligence, managed document review, and technology strategy. Its expertise and collaborative approach ensure that clients receive high-value, integrated services that align with their unique requirements.
“It’s always a pleasure to be recognized by Canadian Lawyer ’s readers and we’re grateful for their support,” said Susan Wortzman, MT❯3’s founder and McCarthy Tétrault partner. “We’re constantly evaluating the best technologies and approaches in a space that is changing every day, and we’re always excited to find novel and efficient ways to help our clients achieve their goals. This is an exciting time to work in the space and we’re all delighted with the recognition.”
The annual Canadian Lawyer Readers’ Choice Awards recognize top legal vendors and suppliers. Voters cast thousands of votes every year across different categories to highlight the businesses they rely on to achieve their legal goals.
MT❯3, a division of McCarthy Tétrault, is Canada’s leading law firm specializing in providing advice and services relating to the management of digital information. The team offers a wide range of legal, strategic and technical services, particularly in e-Discovery, information governance and technology strategy, and has been a pioneer of machine learning and AI technologies in the legal sector. Learn how our team can help you .

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact media@mccarthy.ca .
- Susan Wortzman Partner People.Offices.Singular Toronto
